title: Backend Developer
description: Hesap positions itself as Turkey’s next-generation financial product comparison platform. It is an AI-powered, one-stop financial platform that enables individuals to make informed financial decisions by providing seamless access to the most competitive banking and financial products — including loans, credit cards, deposit options, electronic money solutions, open banking, and investment products — all within a single platform. Powered by AI-driven, real-time data and insights, Hesap delivers personalized financial recommendations through an integrated network of financial institutions, ensuring a transparent, efficient, and superior user experience. We are looking for Backend Developer (Kotlin/Java) to join our dynamic and fast-paced team. To build a best-in-class fintech platform, you will work with product managers, QA engineers, backend, frontend, and mobile developers. What do we expect from you? Bachelor's degree in computer engineering, mathematics, or other related fields, Minimum 2 years experience in backend software development Strong understanding of software development methodologies, Proven ability to troubleshoot complex issues and solve problems efficiently, Effective communication skills Expert knowledge of object-oriented concepts and technologies such as software architectures, design patterns Professional experience with Kotlin or Java (willingness to learn Kotlin is a plus!). If you have strong Java experience and a willingness to learn Kotlin, we would love to hear from you Experience with Spring (Spring Framework, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Data, etc.) Hands-on experience with API design Experience with relational databases like PostgreSQL, Oracle, etc. Experience with NoSQL databases like MongoDB, Redis, Couchbase, etc. Experience with message queues like Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc. Experience with container technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, etc. Experience with cloud platforms like GCP, AWS, Azure, or Huawei Cloud Knowledge on distributed systems and microservice architecture is a plus Strong desire to learn and explore innovative technologies What will you do when you join us? Work within an agile team to define, design, build and ship new features and extend existing ones Analyze requirements and constraints, propose innovative solutions, and evaluate their impact on business goals Collaborate with your team and business stakeholders to develop solutions that maximize customer value and drive continuous improvement Write clean, maintainable code with unit tests and participate in peer code-reviews Contribute to implement the software engineering best practices for the full software development life cycle including software design, coding standards, code reviews, test processes, deployment strategies, and maintenance Actively contribute to the continuous improvement of our development processes and engineering culture Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry trends, applying them to enhance our projects Your personal data is shared with our company, Hesap Bilgi Hizmetleri ve Teknoloji A.Ş ., as the data controller, in order to carry out the recruitment process. It will be processed by. You can access detailed information about the processing of your personal data and your rights via https://hesap.com/bilgi-guvenligi/calisan-adayi-aydinlatma-metni

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Role Overview Job Title: Fullstack Engineer (Java + React) Location: Remote (Candidates must reside in Turkey) Contract: 6 months (highly likely to extend) Cressoft is hiring Fullstack Engineers to support a long-term platform transformation for one of the UK’s leading retail and e-commerce companies. As part of this initiative, you’ll help modernize the core transactional flows—Checkout, Payments, Basket, and Post-Order—across a platform that serves over 70% of the UK population. this post is ONLY for 4+ years experienced people, please do not apply if your experience is less, as it will be automatically rejected. Please follow this page, as we will post new roles soon 🔍 What You’ll Do Build and enhance customer-facing and backend features using Java 8+ , React , and TypeScript Contribute to the re-architecture of high-traffic retail systems for scalability and performance Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams across the UK and nearshore teams Implement best practices in testing (React Testing Library, Cypress), code quality , and CI/CD pipelines Work in an Agile environment delivering incremental value through reusable, testable components Engage in code reviews, feature planning, and performance optimization ✅ Requirements: At least 4 years overall development experience A balanced full-stack profile (50% frontend / 50% backend) Java 17+ & Spring Boot Strong frontend proficiency with React and/or Next.js (server components experience is a plus) TypeScript & JavaScript Experience with Tailwind CSS Microservices architecture and event-driven systems (Kafka or similar) PostgreSQL or similar relational databases Frontend testing: React Testing Library, Enzyme, Cypress Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions preferred) Excellent English communication skills Ability to collaborate effectively in Agile/Scrum teams 🛠 Nice to Have Familiarity with TDD , Kubernetes (AWS) , and cloud-native environments Exposure to BDD (Cucumber) or functional programming concepts Knowledge with Terraform 🌍 Why Cressoft? Cressoft has delivered high-impact tech talent and consulting services across the UK since 2011. As the exclusive offshore partner for one of the UK’s largest retail engineering organizations, we offer long-term remote roles where engineers contribute directly to systems used by millions every day. 🔗 Apply Now Click Apply and help shape the next-generation retail platform from wherever you are in Turkey. Let me know if you'd like a second version for email outreach or a shorter variation for LinkedIn job post preview.

title: REACT JS DEVELOPER
description: About vMind At vMind, we are a leading technology company in Cloud Solutions, Managed Services and System Integration. With experience across 26+ industries and deep expertise in cloud technologies, we deliver solutions that transform how businesses run and accelerate their digital journeys. Powered by strong global technology partnerships and our expert teams, we help organizations achieve their growth goals by providing cost-efficient, innovative and reliable IT services on top of our sovereign, high-performance cloud platforms. Mission of the Role As a React JS Developer, you will design and build modern, scalable, and user-centric front-end applications that power vMind’s digital platforms and enterprise solutions. Responsibilities Develop modern, responsive user interfaces using React.js. Collaborate closely with UI/UX designers, backend engineers, and product teams. Maintain, refactor, and enhance existing front-end applications. Optimize for performance, accessibility, and scalability. Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility. Write clean, reusable, and testable code with proper documentation. Participate in code reviews and agile ceremonies (planning, daily, retro). Qualifications 2+ years of hands-on experience with React.js. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3. Experience integrating RESTful APIs. Familiarity with Git and collaborative workflows (PRs, branching). Strong problem-solving and analytical skills. Ability to work both independently and in a team. Good command of English. Nice to Have TypeScript experience. State management (Redux, Zustand, or Context API). Next.js experience. Component libraries (Material UI, Ant Design) or Tailwind CSS. Basic testing (Jest, React Testing Library). Talent Pool Note If your profile is a close match, we may keep your application in the vMind Talent Pool for future opportunities.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: REST API mimarisi konusunda deneyimli, Node.js/Express ekosisteminde güçlü bir Full Stack Developer başvurularını bekliyoruz. Pozisyon: Full Stack Developer Çalışma Modeli: Hibrit Deneyim: En az 2-3 Yıl Neler Yapacaksın? • RESTful API'lerin tasarımı, geliştirilmesi ve bakımı • Şirket içi (in-house) yazılım çözümlerinin sıfırdan oluşturulması ve mevcut sistemlerin iyileştirilmesi • Frontend ve backend entegrasyonlarının uçtan uca yönetimi • Veritabanı modellemesi, sorgu optimizasyonu ve veri katmanı tasarımı • Mevcut API'lerin performans analizi, iyileştirme ve dokümantasyonu • Ekip içi kod incelemeleri (code review) ve teknik karar süreçlerine katkı Beklentilerimiz: • Node.js ve Express.js ile RESTful API tasarımı ve geliştirme konusunda güçlü deneyim • Frontend teknolojilerine hakimiyet (React, Vue.js vb.) • Veritabanı yönetimi (PostgreSQL, MongoDB vb.) • Git versiyon kontrol sistemi kullanımı • API güvenliği, authentication/authorization mekanizmaları (JWT, OAuth) • Temiz kod yazma, SOLID prensiplerine uygunluk Ek Nitelikler: • Docker ve CI/CD süreçlerine aşinalık • Mikroservis mimarisi deneyimi • Unit ve entegrasyon test yazma alışkanlığı • Agile/Scrum metodolojileriyle çalışma deneyimi
